close_reason: Done in commit 09f3011. Added 25 current-branch verification regression scenarios with mocked process/git/beadwork, fixed persisted remediation idempotency gap, and passed package lint/test/typecheck.
description:
Comprehensive regression tests for the entire current-branch verification pipeline.

## What to test

1. Closed-ticket exited current-branch workers trigger verification, not worktree landing.
2. Verification skips rebase, merge-back, containment checks, and worktree cleanup.
3. Attribution evidence pack includes all expected sections.
4. Per-worker review runs for every completion (when enabled).
5. Review does NOT construct/pass a truncated patch bundle.
6. Review is centered on ticket-attributed commits.
7. Coordinator triage classifies findings correctly.
8. `fix` findings trigger remediation with correct prompt.
9. Closed-ticket remediation reopens/comments the ticket before relaunch and closes again after success.
10. Repeated polls/restarts do not launch duplicate remediation workers for the same findings.
11. `file` findings create beadwork follow-up without blocking.
12. `reject` findings are discarded.
13. Remediation cap at 2 attempts enforced.
14. Missing attribution → `attention`.
15. Valid commits missing ticket ids attributable through handoff/comment evidence.
16. Branch drift detected → `attention`.
17. Detached-HEAD workers launched via explicit opt-in include enough evidence for verification and do not use normal branch-drift assumptions.
18. Ancestry check failure → `attention`.
19. Already-verified workers return immediately on re-inspection (idempotency).
20. Repeated verification after restart does NOT duplicate remediation launches.
21. Repeated verification does NOT create duplicate follow-up beadwork tasks.
22. Worktree mode verification (landing) unchanged.
23. Review/triage/remediation diagnostics include enough structured logs to debug a failure without rerunning.
24. Reviewer output parses into `ReviewFinding[]` with raw output preserved.
25. Reviewer parse failure routes to `attention` with raw output/artifacts, not silent approval.

## Tests Location

`packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/current-branch-verification.test.ts`

## Definition of Done

- All 25+ test scenarios pass.
- Tests use mocked process/git/beadwork for isolation.
- Tests clearly document verification contract.
- Idempotency, ticket lifecycle, and logging assertions are included.
- lint/test/typecheck pass clean.

comments.text: Implemented Phase 3 current-branch verification regression coverage in packages/pi-beadwork-extension/src/__tests__/unit/current-branch-verification.test.ts with 25 scenario tests. Added a minimal orchestrator idempotency guard for persisted remediation-in-progress findings to avoid duplicate relaunch after restart. Quality gates run: npm run lint -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension, npm run test -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension, npm run typecheck -w @solvedbydev/pi-beadwork-extension. Commit: 09f3011 test(pi-beadwork): cover current-branch verification regressions sbdpi-qmd.3.5

title: Add Phase 3 verification regression tests
